ogTitle: Tumbling Waters vs Undoolya: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tumbling Waters and Undoolya.
heading: Tumbling Waters vs Undoolya — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tumbling Waters, Northern Territory and Undoolya, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Undoolya has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Tumbling Waters (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tumbling Waters or Undoolya safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tumbling Waters has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Undoolya scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tumbling Waters scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Undoolya scores 15/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tumbling Waters or Undoolya?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Undoolya has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
